title: Happy Ghast Platforms
description: Changes texture of boats to ghasts' platforms like in Minecraft Movie!
body:
**This pack require EMF (Entity Model Features) and ETF (Entity Texture Features) or Optifine, otherwise it will not work.**

---

Changes Boat and Chest Boat into platforms seen on ghasts in **A Minecraft Movie**. Just leash it to Happy Ghast and fly with it! **NOTE: only difference between boats is shape of platform, all boats are made out of the same wood (Oak).** See galery tab for more info about shapes and variants of platforms.
